scope: AgenC agents/registry.ts ↔ codex codex-rs/core/src/agent/registry.rs + protocol/src/agent_path.rs strict parity

requiredBehaviors: AgentRegistry class wraps the slot/path/nickname state
byPath map indexes live agents by canonical AgentPath
byThreadId map indexes by ThreadId
totalCount tracks active spawned threads for max-thread enforcement
AsyncLock-protected mutator entry points keep concurrent mutators serialized at await boundaries
AgentMetadata interface fields: agentId, agentPath, agentNickname, agentRole, lastTaskMessage
AgenC adds depth (intentional adaptation; codex stores depth via SessionSource)
structurally-cloneable JSON-friendly shape for rollout snapshots
SpawnReservation tracks the lifecycle of an in-flight spawn (slot held, awaiting commit/release)
finalize commits the reservation: registers metadata via finalizeSpawnReservation; throws AgentPathExistsError on dup
release rolls back the slot via rollbackSpawnReservation; safe to call multiple times (isReleased)
carries the abort controller for I-32 cancellation propagation
I-63 atomic slot acquisition via slotLock.with
throws AgentLimitReachedError when totalCount >= maxThreads
increments totalCount inside the lock so concurrent reservations cannot observe a stale count
returns a SpawnReservation carrying maxThreads + a fresh AbortController
decrements totalCount on uncommitted reservation
matches codex Drop-impl semantics: nicknames are NOT released (intentionally sticky)
idempotent: repeated calls are safe
I-37: throws AgentPathExistsError when agentPath collides with an existing entry
registers metadata in byPath and byThreadId atomically (synchronous tail of the spawn flow)
marks reservation as committed so subsequent release() is a no-op
decrements totalCount and removes the path entry on agent shutdown/completion
matches codex's release_spawned_thread: nickname stays reserved (intentionally sticky)
idempotent for unrecognized threadIds
idempotent: re-registering the same root threadId is a no-op
registers /root in byPath
matches codex's entry().or_insert_with semantics
returns ThreadId by canonical AgentPath
undefined for unrecognized paths
consistent with byPath snapshot at the call site
returns AgentMetadata by ThreadId
undefined for an unrecognized thread
exposes a frozen snapshot that callers cannot mutate
returns the full AgentMetadata array for currently registered agents
filters root entries from the iterator (matches codex live_agents semantics)
stable ordering for snapshot consumers
patches AgentMetadata.lastTaskMessage in place by threadId
no-op for unrecognized threadIds (does not throw)
callers (sendInput / appendMessage) feed renderInputPreview output
validates the agent path with assertValidAgentPath
throws InvalidAgentPathError when the path fails validation
writes a reservation marker before child startup so same-path concurrent spawns cannot both proceed
release removes only an uncommitted reservation marker and finalize replaces its own marker with live metadata
picks a nickname from the role-supplied or default pool
exhaustion: clears the used set and bumps nicknameResetCount, then retries (matches codex's reserve_agent_nickname_with_preference fallback)
synchronous; safe to call inside the post-await synchronous tail of the spawn flow
assertValidAgentName enforces lowercase [a-z0-9_]+; rejects 'root', '.', '..', empty
assertValidAgentPath rejects empty, trailing slash, requires /root or /morpheus prefix
joinAgentPath builds canonical child path; rejects invalid segments
depthOfAgentPath returns hop count below /root (0 for /root, 1 for /root/x, etc.)
agentPathName returns the trailing segment ('root' for /root, etc.)
resolveAgentPath accepts canonical, /root, /morpheus, or relative reference; threads through assertValidAgentPath
